debug_info.goal:
x y z w : ℕ
ht : 1 < x ∧ 1 < y ∧ 1 < z
hw : 0 ≤ w
h0 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑x = 24
h1 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑y = 40
h2 : Real.log ↑w / Real.log (↑x * ↑y * ↑z) = 12
⊢ Real.log ↑w / Real.log ↑z = 60

proof:
have hx : Real.log x = (Real.log w) / 24 := by field_simp [h0.symm, (log_pos (by linarith [ht.1] : 1 < (x : ℝ))).ne']
  have hy : Real.log y = (Real.log w) / 40 := by field_simp [h1.symm, (log_pos (by linarith [ht.2.1] : 1 < (y : ℝ))).ne']
  have hxyz : Real.log (x * y * z) = (Real.log w) / 12 := by field_simp [h2.symm, (log_pos (by linarith [ht.1, ht.2.1, ht.2.2] : 1 < (x : ℝ) * y * z)).ne']
  rw [log_mul (by linarith [ht.1]) (by linarith [ht.2.1, ht.2.2]), log_mul (by linarith [ht.1, ht.2.1]) (by linarith [ht.2.2])] at hxyz
  rw [hx, hy] at hxyz
  field_simp at hxyz
  linear_combination hxyz
